chapter_title.ar: باب مَا يُحْصِنُ وَ مَا لَا يُحْصِنُ وَ مَا [لَا] يُوجِبُ الرَّجْمَ عَلَى الْمُحْصَنِ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 3 – What constitutes being married and what constitutes not being married, and what does not Obligate the stoning upon the married man

text: سَأَلْتُ أَبَا عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) عَنِ الْمُحْصَنِ قَالَ فَقَالَ الَّذِي يَزْنِي وَ عِنْدَهُ مَا يُغْنِيهِ .

en.hubeali: Ali Bin Ibrahim, from Muhammad Bin Isa Bin Ubeyd, from Yunus, from Hareyz who said,
‘I asked Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> about the married man, so he<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘The one who commits adultery and with him is what makes him to be needless of it’.
